reviews.comment:
Buenas instalaciones. Buen combustible. Tiene duchas pero no andan porque no funciona el agua caliente hace años, una pena. Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Good facilities. Good fuel. It has showers, but they don't work because the hot water hasn't worked for years, which is a shame. Recommended.
